achievements.title: Barbecue?
achievements.description: Pick up a.. barbecue?
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Winner Winner Chicken Pickup?
achievements.description: Pick up a chicken.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Garlic.. Ghhhhaaaarlic!
achievements.description: Pick up a garlic.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: This Lobster Is Fried!
achievements.description: Pick up a fried lobster. As opposed to a non-fried lobster.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: C is for.. Coo.. Cake!
achievements.description: Pick up a cake.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Want Fries With That?
achievements.description: Pick up some fried potatoes.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Ball Made Of Rice?
achievements.description: Pick up a rice ball.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: What Is A Dango Anyway?
achievements.description: Pick up a dango. Oh.. Yeah! A dango is a japanese treat.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Spongebob's House?
achievements.description: Pick up a pineapple. Did you know Spongebob lives in a pineapple? Under the sea..? Makes sense!
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Scoop! There It Is!
achievements.description: Pick up some ice cream. Five second rule?!
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: How About This Apple?
achievements.description: Pick up an apple.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Bunch Of Grapes
achievements.description: Pick up some grapes.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Not Pepsi!
achievements.description: Pick up a can of cola. Not Pepsi.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Sweet Tooth!
achievements.description: Pick up some candy. Found in nature and consists of 120% sugar.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Coffee! COFFEE! COVFEFE!!
achievements.description: Pick up a cup of coffee. Black. No sugar. No Milk. Pure Black.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Tree Shoe?
achievements.description: Pick up a pair of wodden clogs.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Strike A Pose!
achievements.description: Pick up a camera.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Have You Read This?
achievements.description: Pick up a book. Pretend it's a good one!
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Puff Puff!
achievements.description: Pick up a pipe. Smoking is bad for you!
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Mirror, Mirror On The..Floor?
achievements.description: Pick up a mirror.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Cool Shades Bro!
achievements.description: Pick up a pair of sunglasses.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Ruby Schmuby!
achievements.description: Pick up a ruby. As you already know, this is a gemstone in the corundum family.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Sapphir.. Sapphire? Safire? Sappire?
achievements.description: Pick up a Sapphir. Spelled wrong, but it is actually more durable than diamond.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Green Stone?
achievements.description: Pick up an emerald. Contains trace amounts of chromium and sometimes vanadium.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: It's Not A Bag, It's A Man-Bag
achievements.description: Pick up a pink bag.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Kettle Calling The Pot Black?
achievements.description: Pick up a kettle.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: A Winner Is You!
achievements.description: Pick up a trophy. Well deserved!
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: My Shade Of Lipstick
achievements.description: Pick up a lipstick.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Just Brush It Off!
achievements.description: Pick up a brush. Looks like a pretty basic painting brush.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Slick Silk Hat!
achievements.description: Pick up a silk hat.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Nice Ink Man!
achievements.description: Pick up some ink. This is not for creating tattoos!
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Perfume Sniffer
achievements.description: Pick up a perfume bottle. Then sniff it.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Ding-e-ling-e-ling!
achievements.description: Pick up a bell.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Finders Keepers?
achievements.description: Pick up a money bag.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.description: Complete level 1 by defeating Tam Tam in the underground.

achievements.description: Complete level 2 by defeating Lee at the factory.

achievements.description: Complete level 3 by defeating Doctor D at the hospital.

achievements.title: Rumble In The.. Casino!
achievements.description: Complete level 4 by defeating Hammer Bull in the ring.
achievements.author: Wimpy

achievements.title: Saving Catherine!
achievements.description: Complete level 5 and save Catherine by defeating Dick at the syndicate HQ.
